action_buttons.confirm_date_message: You picked {{date}}. Continue to time selection?
action_buttons.unverified_hours_message: We couldn't verify {{venueName}}'s hours for that time. Schedule anyway?
action_buttons.error_past_date_message: That time has already passed. Please choose a time in the future.
action_buttons.error_save: Failed to save the card. Please try again.
action_buttons.error_login: You must be logged in to schedule cards.
action_buttons.error_invalid_date: The selected date is not valid. Please try again.
action_buttons.schedule_failed_body: We couldn't add this to your calendar. Please try again.
action_buttons.place_closed_body: This place is closed at the selected date and time. Please choose a different time.
action_buttons.scheduled_toast: Scheduled! {{title}} has been moved to your calendar
action_buttons.closed_message: This place is closed at the selected date and time. Tap "Schedule" to choose a different time.
